title: Greek Gratins
description: A simple and delicious recipe combining the flavors of Greece with the comfort of gratins.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine yogurt, shredded cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, mix grated gratin, flour, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a greased 8-inch square baking dish, create a layer of the gratin mixture. Top with a layer of the yogurt-cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of gratin on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with dried oregano.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is tender.
Remove from oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
